name: rule-engine closed-loop step deprecation-migration runs the migrate-rule command for a deprecated rule
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  old-rule: warn\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step deprecation-migration --from old-rule --to new-rule --profile profiles/p.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'migrate_invoked=true' out.txt && grep -q 'planned: old-rule -> new-rule' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
